markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.154 — Alteration of Certificate or Receipt

A person commits an offense if the person alters a manufacturer’s certificate, a title receipt, or a title.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 65, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person alters a manufacturer’s certificate, a title receipt, or a title.
